_note: Canonical Dwight / BMG brand story. Source of truth for the Guide block (homepage + every Tier-2), the /about page body, and proof-point fragments used across the site. Edit here, not in components.
tagline: Scrappy. ROI-first. Twenty years of getting customers to call.
proof_points: 20+ years from green screens to AI-powered search
3.78 ROAS sustained for a $150M packaging distributor
Doubled organic SEO performance for mid-market clients
Built AI Answer Call, a 24/7 AI voice receptionist
guide_short: I'm Dwight Davis. I started in my mom's basement on an IBM PC JR, writing databases on green screens before personal computers were normal. Twenty years later I'm still here, except now I'm placing $450,000 a month in paid media and watching every dollar to make sure it's bringing real customers, not just clicks. I built Boise Marketing Guy because I've seen too many small businesses pour money into marketing that doesn't move the needle. Yours shouldn't be one of them.
guide_full: Meet Dwight Davis, the scrappy, ROI-first marketing leader behind Boise Marketing Guy. With over 20 years of experience building demand generation for high-growth SaaS and mid-market companies, Dwight started his journey in his mom's basement, armed with an IBM PC JR before personal computers were the norm. He began writing databases on green screens during a time when the first digital revolutions were turning industries upside down.

Throughout his career, Dwight has thrived in every major technological evolution, from client-server setups to the rise of online marketing, SEO, and AI-powered apps. His passion for helping small businesses navigate the digital landscape stems from his personal experiences as a serial entrepreneur. He understands the constraints of time and resources that every small business owner faces. That's why he dedicates his expertise to help these businesses turn their marketing into a revenue-generating machine.

Dwight recalls the frustrating days of navigating poor ad spend and witnessing the injustices of ineffective marketing. This sparked his resolve to find solutions that actually work. His hands-on approach means he personally manages around $450,000 a month in paid media, ensuring that every dollar of ad spend is justified and drives real results for his clients. Through his innovative AI tools, like AI Answer Call, a 24/7 AI voice receptionist, he's streamlined outreach and boosted conversion rates for numerous clients.

With a track record of remarkable successes, like doubling SEO performance and sustaining a 3.78 ROAS for a $150M packaging distributor, Dwight knows that clarity and efficiency lead to growth. He's not just a marketing consultant; he's a results-driven partner eager to see his clients thrive. Join Dwight on this journey to escape the noise and grow your business to its full potential. Experience the visibility and success you've always dreamed of. Let's chat today and turn your marketing challenges into victories.
credentials_line: Twenty years in. $450k a month in paid media. Built AI tools clients actually use.
